name: Admin User
description: Pre-seeded admin — actor for all CRUD tests. Has MANAGE_USERS permission. Used as JWT identity for IT-01 through IT-07 and all SIT tests.

name: Neural User
description: Pre-seeded NEURAL_ARCHITECT — no MANAGE_USERS. Used for IT-03 (forbidden access) and PBT-12 (unauthorized rejection).

name: Reader User
description: Pre-seeded READER — no MANAGE_USERS. Used for IT-03 (forbidden access) and PBT-12 (unauthorized rejection).

name: Disabled User
description: Pre-seeded DISABLED user — used for PBT-11 (disabled auth rejection) and SIT-08 (enable user).

name: Delete Target
description: Pre-seeded user designated for delete tests — SIT-09 and SIT-10. Name must be typed exactly for confirmation dialog.
